questions.objective_ref: Create a Python list with square-bracket syntax and store multiple values inside it.
Access any item in a list by its position number (index), starting from zero.
Modify a specific item in a list by assigning a new value to its index.
Iterate over every item in a list using a for item in list: loop.
Use append() to add a new item to the end of a list and len() to count how many items the list contains.
